creator: nbe@renzel.net
text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #6)

well, I cloned the SSD of the working laptop to the SSD of the nonworking laptop; so both FreeBSD kernels and base systems are identical. ;-)

FWIW, Linux seems to use AX200 firmware version "48.4fa0041f.0". I'm attaching the dmesg output of a Linux Mint right now.

The nonworking laptop is very, very slightly different. Different touchpad and some values in the ACPI tables are different as well.

If you want the ACPI tables I can send them to you if you like.

BTW, thanks for all your great work in iwlwifi so far, Björn...



BR,
Nils
